## What's Changed

- Renamed the Queue page to Activity in the server web UI.
- Added a Playback History panel that shows recent Local and NZB streams.
- Activity rows now show which paired Tater Tube Player played matching NZB stream items.
- Dashboard player cards now use player IDs from stream telemetry so current and last-played status is more reliable.
- Local and NZB stream tracking now carries the paired player ID through active stream and history data.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

Keep your existing `/config`, media folder, cache, and hardware device mappings.
